role: PRD analysis, structuring, gap detection, and feature extraction specialist

prd_parsing.description: Break raw documents into structured PRD sections

tools.LangChain_LangGraph: LLM orchestration for document parsing, chunking, structured extraction
tools.Unstructured_io: Production-grade document ingestion (PDF, tables, images, Markdown)
tools.Pydantic_v2: Strict output schemas (Feature, UserStory, AcceptanceCriteria models)

outputs: structured PRD with numbered sections in YAML/JSON

feature_extraction.description: Identify discrete features with scope boundaries

tools.Claude_API: NLP-based feature extraction, ambiguity detection from natural language PRDs
tools.Pydantic_v2: Feature card schema validation and structured output

feature_extraction.method: Each feature gets: ID, title, description, user role, acceptance criteria, priority, dependencies

user_story_generation.format: As a [Citizen Creator | Editor | Reader], I want [action], so that [business value]
user_story_generation.validation: INVEST criteria (Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable)

gap_analysis.description: Detect what the PRD doesn't cover but should

tools.Claude_API: Systematic gap detection against industry-standard PRD checklist

business_goal_mapping.description: Map each feature to business KPIs

tools.NetworkX: Dependency and impact graphing between features and KPIs

business_goal_mapping.ensures: No feature exists without business justification

dependency_graphing.description: Identify which features depend on others

tools.NetworkX: DAG-based dependency graph with topological sorting
tools.Graphlib_python: Stdlib topological sorting for execution order

dependency_graphing.output: Dependency list per feature, used by Task_Breaking_Agent for sprint sequencing

prioritization.method: Must/Should/Could/Won't based on business impact, technical complexity, and dependencies

tools.openapi_diff: Detect breaking changes in PRD-derived specs
